\tzpentry{ID3569}{Dipole Quantum State Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID3569 introduces Dipole Quantum State Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[ \Psi_{\rm dipole}(\theta)=A_d\cos\theta \qquad(\text{this is proportional to }Y_{1}^{0}). \]
